description: A conceptual design engineer working on a new hybrid-electric regional aircraft must add a distributed array of electric motors to the leading edge of an existing cruise wing. The baseline wing model is loaded at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/baseline_wing.vsp3. A specification document containing the exact coordinates and dimensions for the propeller array is located at /home/ga/Desktop/dep_layout_spec.txt. Read the specification document, add the specified Propeller components to the right semi-span, enable planar symmetry so they appear on the left semi-span as well, and save the updated model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/dep_wing.vsp3.
